title: CoffeeG's Combat Overhauled
description: Enhance minecraft combat system with MANY new weapon
body:
# CCO > CoffeeG's Combat Overhauled - Enhance Minecraft Combat System # Versions Any Minecraft version from 1.16.x and up. \ Platform: Datapack,Mod(Fabric,Forge,Quilt) \ **Warning:** CCO's Mod Version is not compatible with any mods that modify Advancement and Recipe system (A accurate list will come soon) # Information > This project is pre-release, more features will come soons! ## Melee Weapon --- ### Scythe #### Crafting #### Skills > `Death Pull` : After 4 melee attack, gain a special attack pulling back enemy --- ### Hammer #### Crafting > Special thanks to `omar` for the suggestion! #### Skills > `1000 Tons`: Work SIMILAR to THE MACE (1.20.1). Falling on the ground from 3 or up block height will cause damage to all entity in 3x3 square of player (Damage depend on material of item) (4 Seconds Countdown) --- ### Rapier #### Crafting #### Skills > `Attack & Defend`: Press Sneak(L-Shift) give you `Speed II` and `Resistance II` effects for 2-sec (7 Seconds coundown) --- ## Dagger #### Crafting #### Skills > `Justt Dagger`: Increase movement and attack speed when held on hand --- ## Katana #### Crafting #### Skills > `Assasin` : Special Attack - Teleport to behind of your enemy (10 Seconds countdown) # Thanks If you want to report bug, add new weapon, or give me an ideas, heres my discord ID: `xd6t`
Credits ## Texture Special Thanks to + Endmir26 (Rapier texture) + ClownPierce (Original Scythe texture) & Starjx (Recolored Scythe texture) + Vexezz (Hammer texture) + Sukuro120 (Katana texture) Made with love 💌
# Try mine another pack + [**CoffeeG's Useful Snowball**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/usefulsnowball) - Useful Snowball! Make snowball slows mob. + [**CoffeeG's Wall Climbing**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffwallclimb) - Add Wall Climb (Wall Jump) mechanic to minecraft + [**CoffeeG's Supereme Back**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/superemeback) - Add `/trigger back` , which command will bring you to your lastest death position + [**CoffeeG's Double Jump**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffdoublejump) - Add Double Jump and Leap mechanic to minecraft with sneak button! + [**CoffeeG's Awful Lightning**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffeegs-awful-lightning) - Struck lightning on players more oftenly, can create fun & surprising deaths with lightning bolts.
